bars.null: a clock that reads nothing (contrast ~ N(0, 12.27))

bars.bar: paired 95% CI on the Exp1-Exp2 offset excludes 0
bars.verdict: CONDITIONAL — depends on the matched-pair count, reported at runtime (T4)

bars.null: n/a — an estimate with a chi-square CI, not a test
bars.verdict: EXPECTED UNRESOLVABLE at n=6 — the variance is known only to ~a factor of six, so INDETERMINATE is the pre-registered likely outcome (T2)

M1.reason: extreme contrast 11.8 yr vs bar 20.2 yr (true gap 53 yr, clock cv_mae 12.27)

M2.reason: no matched (donor, day, marker) pairs span Exp1 and Exp2; the batch offset is unidentifiable and fix option (a) is impossible

M3.reason: observed offset SD 16.4 yr vs 12.3 yr from a single baseline -> share 56% (95% CI 9%-100%); 10.9 yr SD remains for biology+batch+model

decision.reason: the clock does not separate the age extremes on this data, so ΔAge's target is unvalidated. This reaches past Stage 1.5 into Stage 4 and Stage 2's premise is void as stated. Do not proceed to Phase 2/3.
